data: {"generalSituation":"Relatively humid easterly airstreams will affect the coast of eastern Guangdong in the next couple of days. There will be mist patches. It will be warm during the day. With a southerly airstream gradually affecting the coast of southern China early next week, it will be hot with one or two showers over the region. A trough of low pressure is expected to linger over the vicinity of southern China next week, bringing unsettled weather to the region. There will be thunderstorms over inland areas.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260326","week":"Thursday","forecastWind":"Light winds force 2, becoming east to southeast force 3.","forecastWeather":"Becoming cloudy with one or two light rain patches.
